name: United School Bus Inc Mansoor
districts_or_customers: Likely Montville Township and adjacent Morris County districts
recent_news: No public M&A or news found; appears to be a micro single-yard NJ contractor at 170 Changebridge Rd, Montville. Nearby contractors at the same Changebridge Rd cluster include O'Dowd Transportation and Sijz Transport.
fit_notes: Sub-scale micro operator (~16 employees, <$1M revenue) in NJ — too small to be a meaningful standalone tuck-in for Summit; only relevant if rolled up with other Morris County micro-contractors at the Changebridge Rd cluster.

name: Sterling School Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely Piscataway Township and Middlesex County districts
recent_news: No public M&A or news found; micro NJ contractor at 2 Lakeview Ave, Piscataway. Not present in surfaced NJSBCA directory listings.
fit_notes: Very small operator (~17 employees, <$1M revenue); manager-led, recent founding (2017) suggests likely owner-operator. Too small as standalone tuck-in but could be folded into a Middlesex County NJ cluster acquisition.

name: J B Big Bus
districts_or_customers: Likely Ypsilanti Community Schools or Washtenaw County districts
recent_news: No public M&A or news found; micro Michigan contractor at 1489 Desoto Ave, Ypsilanti. Not to be confused with B-J School Buses Inc. (separate company).
fit_notes: Sub-scale Michigan single-yard operator (~19 employees, <$1M revenue); name suggests owner-operator (James Bennett initials). Too small for standalone Summit tuck-in interest unless part of a Washtenaw/SE Michigan roll-up.

name: Bert Bendickson School Bus
principals: Joyce Marie Bendickson (officer; related entity Bendickson School Bus Service Inc, USDOT 939415)
districts_or_customers: Bejou-area / Mahnomen County / White Earth Reservation district routes (rural NW Minnesota)
recent_news: FMCSA records show Bendickson School Bus Service Inc (USDOT 939415, first registered 2001) and a separate Bert Bendickson DOT 2923232 — both at Bejou, MN. Obituary noted for Albertha Bendickson of Mahnomen, suggesting multi-generational family operation. No M&A activity.
fit_notes: True family-owned micro operator in rural NW Minnesota — confirmed independent but extremely small (2 drivers per FMCSA, <$1M revenue). Geographically remote from Summit's core footprint; not a tuck-in priority despite high succession signal.

name: A M C School Bus Trnsprtn Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely Lynn Public Schools / North Shore MA districts
recent_news: No public M&A or news found for AMC School Bus Transportation Inc at 896 Western Ave, Lynn. Note: separate, larger family-run McCarthy Bus operates in central/western MA, and NRT Bus (Beacon Mobility-affiliated landscape) serves Lynn — AMC appears to be a distinct, smaller independent.
fit_notes: Micro Lynn, MA operator (~13 employees, ~$559K revenue) in heavily PE-consolidated MA market (NRT/Beacon Mobility dominates). Female president with shared McCarthy surname (no confirmed link to McCarthy Bus). Too small for standalone Summit tuck-in but could be part of a North Shore MA bolt-on play.
